style: Painterly retro-futurist sci-fi game illustration, clean limited palette, soft even studio light, centered subject on a plain dark panel background, restrained and iconic. No real-person likenesses, no text, no letters, no numbers, no logos, no insignia, no modern brand objects.

assets.lead: A composed starship captain in a fitted amber command tunic, calm and authoritative, head-and-shoulders portrait.
A calm science officer in a deep-blue tunic, analytical and even-tempered, head-and-shoulders portrait.
A practical operations chief in a teal tunic standing beside a softly glowing transporter pad, head-and-shoulders portrait.
A watchful security constable in a deep-red tunic with a steady level gaze, head-and-shoulders portrait.
A sleek pale operations android officer with faint circuitry under the skin and a neutral expression, head-and-shoulders portrait.
A generic deck-crew officer in a plain grey tunic, neutral expression, head-and-shoulders portrait.
An empty retro-futurist starship bridge interior with a central command chair and a large dark viewscreen, wide establishing shot.
A quiet retro-futurist transporter room with a circular pad and soft amber light, empty, wide shot.
A single empty red officer tunic folded on a bare metal deck, somber and still, still-life.
